title: Grilled Uni Ouzi with Middle Eastern Spices
description: A unique fusion of Middle Eastern flavors with the sweetness of uni, served as a snack or appetizer.

ingredients.name: Middle Eastern Spice Blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most Middle Eastern grocery stores

instructions: 2. Season the uni with Middle Eastern Spice Blend, salt, and a squeeze of lemon juice.
3. Grill the uni for 2-3 minutes per side, or until slightly charred.
4. Meanwhile, warm the ouzi rice according to package instructions.
5. To assemble, place a portion of ouzi rice on a plate, followed by a grilled uni slice.
6. Drizzle with olive oil and garnish with chopped parsley, if desired.
